assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets ServerSideSessions.FuzzExpiredSessionRemovalStart = true (explicitly or by relying on the default)
assertions.rationale: The without_skill response does not set `FuzzExpiredSessionRemovalStart` explicitly, nor does it mention the option or that it defaults to true. The prompt asked to 'make sure the first cleanup run is randomized', which requires explicit acknowledgment of this setting.
